hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit'; then cd /home/user/ConceptSailing && if ! npm run build 2>&1; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"npm run build failed — fix build errors before committing"}}'; exit 1; fi; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Running npm run build before commit...
